subject: Shift swap request — June 28
body_preview: Gerald, need to swap my June 28 shift with Yolanda Reynolds. She's confirmed. Floors 12-18 will be covered. Let me know if you need anything from HR side.

subject: Re: Shift swap request — June 28
body_preview: Approved. Make sure Yolanda signs the coverage form before the shift.

subject: Supply order — housekeeping floors 12-18
body_preview: Putting in the monthly supply order. Need 4 cases of microfiber cloths, 3 cases of multi-surface cleaner, and 2 cases of bathroom disinfectant. Running low on laundry bags too — 200 pack if possible.

subject: Re: Supply order — housekeeping floors 12-18
body_preview: Order submitted to procurement. Expect delivery Thursday. I approved the laundry bags too.

subject: Mandatory safety training — July 10
body_preview: Annual OSHA refresher and chemical handling training is scheduled for July 10 at 9:00 AM in the Lower Level Conference Room B. Attendance is mandatory for all supervisors. Please confirm receipt.

subject: Q3 performance review schedule
body_preview: Chris, your Q3 review is set for July 22 at 2:00 PM. I'll have last quarter's inspection scores pulled up. Come ready to talk about the floors 16 and 17 turnover times.

subject: Overtime request — June 21 and June 22
body_preview: Convention checkout surge this weekend is going to hit floors 14 and 15 hard. Requesting 4 hours OT on Saturday and Sunday to stay ahead of it. Let me know.

subject: Re: Overtime request — June 21 and June 22
body_preview: Approved both days. Submit your hours through the portal by Monday EOD.

subject: New hire orientation — housekeeping team
body_preview: Two new housekeeping attendants start Monday June 23. Darnell Webb (floors 12-14) and Lucia Rios (floors 15-18). Please conduct floor walkthroughs with both on their first day and log completion.

subject: NV Energy — June bill ready to view
body_preview: Your June statement is available. Amount due: $138.44 by July 10. Log in to view or pay.

subject: Isabella — end-of-year grade report
body_preview: Isabella Murray's final grades for the 2025-2026 school year are now available in the parent portal. She passed all courses. Excellent attendance record this semester.

subject: Re: Mariana Rodriguez Quinceañera — vendor coordination
body_preview: Got the shot list from Mary. I'll arrive at Emerald Hall by 4:30 PM on Oct 17. Can you confirm whether we're doing the traditional waltz photos before or after the court presentation?

subject: Housekeeping inspection results — week of June 9
body_preview: Your floors came in at 97.2 average this week. Floor 13 had a restock miss on the mini-bar in room 1308. Otherwise clean. Good week.

subject: Re: Housekeeping inspection results — week of June 9
body_preview: Caught that one myself after the fact. Addressed it with the attendant same day. Won't happen again.
